title: Pigeons!
description: Adds some different species of pigeons and doves to Minecraft.
body:
**Pigeons are my favorite group of birds! So I decided to create this mod, cause I haven't seen any mods about pigeons. Let's spread love to pigeons and remember - pigeons are cute, they aren't flying rats!**

At this moment mod contains current species of columbidae family:

- Common pigeon
- Wood pigeon
- Eurasian collared dove
- Mourning dove
- Western crowned pigeon
- New Zealand pigeon
- Speckled pigeon
- Diamond dove
- Emerald dove
- Archangel pigeon

And I'm planning to add more species and features in future, so keep watching this mod if you are interested!

Pigeons and doves spawns in plains, forest and jungle biomes.

**IMPORTANT UPDATE!**

**1.3.0**

Pigeons' AI is now reworked, so they won't fly away high to space anymore, they now prefers to stay near with their home (their spawn)! Tame a pigeon with seeds to take it with you to the adventures! Use stick to command tamed pigeon to stay or follow you. And also you can breed pigeons using seeds!

**19.09.2025 - we have reached our first 1000 downloads! Thanks everybody for downloading and playing with mod! <3**

[If you like pigeons and this mod, you can support me here.](https://boosty.to/enderaptor)

Mod is translated to Russian language.
